title: illipe cocco
intro: Illipe cocco is a type of tree native to the tropical forests of Africa and Asia, scientifically known as Berteroa incana. The plant's seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of illipe cocco include its ability to soothe and moisturize the skin, reducing irritation and promoting wound healing. Illipe cocco is commonly prepared in herbal form as an oil or powder, often combined with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments for skin care.
